Who we are

DOGE for Scroll Marks = DOGEM

DOGEM is a memecoin that has been minted on the Scroll blockchain.

Scroll Session, the first 25k wallet who have 200 Marks can receive an airdrop. If you are not eligible, click here to check scroll mars. For more detailed information, you can review the tokenomics.

Roadmap of DOGEM

July 3rd, 2024

Website

Website was built.
July 19th, 8 PM UTC

Airdrop launch

Airdrop will be distributed to owners of 200 Marks in Scroll Sessions.
July 19th, 8 PM UTC

Staking Platform

Earn $DOGEM with 360% APY.
July 19th, 9 PM UTC

DEX listing

We will add liquidity to get listed on SyncSwap.
July 24th, 2024

CEX Listing

Listing will begin on CEXs.
July 29th, 2024

Rewards

Extra rewards will be distributed to the top 100 wallets who have earned the most tokens by inviting friends.
